summary: EXP-423 closes ISS-2075 (WIN-070.c1 moderate hole: Exhibit B unfalsifiability argument is in detail_extra only). New paragraph-scope insertion adding point (6) to detail_evidence between point (5) and "Putting it together" closer, implementing c1 recommendation: (a) names the heads-I-win-tails-you-lose falsifiability structure; (b) flags unfalsifiability as a standalone kill-shot; (c) explains the physically-wrong filter promise (Butterworth low-pass leaves spectral leakage + time-domain ringing, does not erase impulsive transients); (d) enumerates missing specifications (cutoff, order, transition-band, spectral signature) the dome owes but does not supply; (e) frames Exhibit B as rhetorical guardrail, not falsifiable filter description. Two new outbound links (Butterworth 1930 + Wikipedia overview). Char delta: +1577. BEFORE string verified unique. TLDRs, detail_verdict_text, finding, code_analysis unchanged. Ready-for-integration.
